claim_boundary: This protocol compares the public FARE leaf representation under the same proxy-calibrated source-inference and task-error contract used by MOSAIC. It does not claim that FARE's original downstream demographic-parity theorem certifies source inference.

protocol.partition: the exact five-way split and seed from the real ACS proxy study
protocol.proxy_calibration: label, true-source, and FARE-leaf-specific confusion tensor
protocol.selection: minimum certified task-error upper bound among passing FARE candidates

stopping_rule: Run every registered leaf-count and alpha pair and report every abstention, release, and held-out diagnostic.
